overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist exploring a tropical coastal environment with ancient ruins. The character moves along rocky outcrops overlooking clear turquoise water, passing palm trees and observing the scenic landscape with overgrown structures in the distance.

agents.ego_description: standing on rocky outcrop looking out at the distant settlement and tropical water

clear turquoise water with visible submerged structures beneath the surface
cluster of overgrown buildings and structures on the distant shoreline across the water
tall cylindrical tower structure covered in vegetation rising from the distant landscape
thick trunk of a palm tree framing the left side of the view

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky coastal outcrop overlooking clear turquoise water. In the distance across the water, an ancient overgrown settlement with a prominent tall tower is visible under a bright sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with submerged ancient structures

events.description: character begins walking along the rocky shore toward the right, revealing submerged ruins in the water

entered.detail: ancient stone structures and debris visible beneath the clear water surface
palm tree with curved trunk leaning over the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rocky shoreline, revealing submerged ancient ruins in the clear turquoise water. A distinctive leaning palm tree comes into view on the right as the distant settlement shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach area under leaning palm tree

events.description: character stops under the leaning palm tree and begins looking around the coastal area

agents.ego_description: standing under the leaning palm tree, slowly turning to survey the beach and surrounding coastal ruins

entered.detail: sandy beach area with palm trees visible beyond the rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: The character stands under the leaning palm tree, surveying the tropical beach area. The camera pans to show the sandy beach, distant coastal ruins, and the tall tower visible again in the background across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rocky coastline that transitions from a wide vista of distant ruins to an intimate view of a tropical beach. It begins on a high outcrop overlooking clear turquoise water, where an ancient overgrown settlement and a prominent tall tower are visible under a bright sunny sky. As the character walks along the shoreline, the perspective shifts to reveal submerged ruins beneath the water's surface while a distinctive leaning palm tree emerges on the right. The scene then settles under the shade of the palm tree, panning across the sandy beach to bring the distant coastal ruins and the tall tower back into focus against the horizon.
